title: Massive AI spending and higher interest rates: What's behind the tech sell-off?
summary: Tech stocks around the world fell on Tuesday, with the flagship Nasdaq index closing 2.2 percent down at the end of the session. In this edition, we look at how markets reacted this Wednesday and some of the reasons why investors sold their shares: massive projected capital expenditure on AI, as well as the prospect of higher interest rates. Also, we examine Spain's pioneering climate leave policy.

Fewer bugs. Faster builds. #ponytail #github #aicoding #firstprinciples #opensource

title: I Tested the Fable 5 Killer (Hermes Agent)
summary: 📈 ALL Systems: https://bit.ly/4kol0y5 🩵 Free Resources: https://bit.ly/3RNNDLa 🔮 Zapier: https://bit.ly/3QB789w Two models have been claiming to kill Claude Fable 5 in the last week, so I put both through real tests inside Hermes agent. Sakana Fugu is an intelligent router that secretly orchestrates a pool of frontier models behind one API, while GLM 5.2 is an open workhorse from China at a sixth of the cost. I run them against Opus 4.8 on tool calling, building a one page website, and improving the Hermes operating system. The results genuinely surprised me, especially how GLM 5.2 held up. I also walk through the exact model routing strategy I'm using going forward. *Core Software* 🔮 Zapier: https://bit.ly/3QB789w 🔥 Glaido: https://bit.ly/4eGoI3R 🤖 Hermes Agent: https://hermes-agent.nousresearch.com/ 🐟 Sakana Fugu: https://sakana.ai/fugu/ 🧠 GLM 5.2: https://z.ai/chat ☁️ Claude: https://claude.ai/ 🐳 DeepSeek: https://www.deepseek.com/ ⌚️ Stamps: 00:00 - Two Models Killed Fable? 00:36 - The Game Of Thrones Problem 01:48 - How Sakana Fugu Works 03:01 - GLM 5.2 The Open Workhorse 03:48 - Connecting Sakana To Hermes 04:46 - Testing Sakana Out 05:40 - Connecting GLM 5.2 06:30 - Checking GLM Works 07:15 - Test One Tool Calling 09:07 - Tool Calling Results 10:05 - Test Two One Page Website 11:01 - Comparing The Websites 13:53 - Test Three Hardest Yet 15:16 - The Build Results 16:09 - Fugu Is Not A Fable Killer 17:02 - The Routing Strategy I Use 18:33 - Why GLM 5.2 Impressed Me I tested Sakana Fugu and GLM 5.2 against Claude Opus 4.8 inside the Hermes agent to see which model is actually best for tool calling, building websites and coding, plus how to connect them with Open Router and Zapier MCP. #HermesAgent #GLM52 #SakanaFugu #ClaudeOpus #AIAgents #AIModels

title: How to Use Proton Pass (Free Password Manager Tutorial)
summary: Most people store their passwords in Chrome or Google Password Manager. It’s convenient, but it means Google holds the keys to your data. Proton Pass is a free alternative that uses end-to-end encryption and a zero-knowledge model, so nobody — not even Proton — can access your passwords. In this video, you'll learn how to use Proton Pass, a free password manager that goes beyond just storing passwords to help protect your privacy online. You'll see how to: • Set up Proton Pass and install the browser extension • Save, autofill, and generate strong passwords • Create email aliases to keep your real email address hidden from websites • Add a PIN to lock your vault when you step away from your computer • Import passwords from Google Password Manager, Chrome, Bitwarden, 1Password, and more All the features covered here are included in the free plan, and for most people, it's all you'll ever need. Host: Garrick Chow #ProtonPass #PasswordManager #Privacy #CyberSecurity #Productivity 📚 RESOURCES Try out Proton Pass: https://proton.me/pass Check out Proton Mail: https://go.getproton.me/aff_c?offer_id=7&aff_id=16368 ⌚ TIMESTAMPS 00:00 - Introduction 00:35 - What is Proton Pass? 01:48 - Create an account 02:25 - Install the browser extension 03:55 - Save existing passwords 04:42 - Generate strong, unique passwords 05:33 - Secure Proton Pass with a PIN 07:17 - Create email aliases 09:18 - Import passwords from other password managers 10:15 - Summary of plans 11:25 - Conclusion 📩 NEWSLETTER - Get the latest high-quality tutorial and tips and tricks videos emailed to your inbox each week: https://kevinstratvert.com/newsletter 🔽 CONNECT WITH ME - Official website: http://www.kevinstratvert.com - LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/kevinstratvert/ - Discord: https://bit.ly/KevinStratvertDiscord - Twitter: https://twitter.com/kevstrat - Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Kevin-Stratvert-101912218227818 - TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@kevinstratvert - Inst
